steps.title: Compare the simulations
steps.content: The control simulation gave lichens access to all water sources, including bark water. The experimental simulation removed bark water and predicted lower biomass plus reduced summer survival for certain species.

steps.title: Infer the water benefit
steps.content: A invents specialized absorption ability. C overstates bark water as most absorbed water. D falsely says bark water reduces biomass, but the decrease occurred when bark water was removed. The evidence suggests bark water helps some lichens handle seasonal water loss. The answer is B.
